title: Dating Advice | #shorts
full_text: Zoya, you just graduated Stanford. Why are you so upset? What has brought you into my therapy practice? Tell me now quickly. Let me fix this. I didn't meet my husband when I was in college. Oh, that but you I told you I will introduce you to him. What is the issue there? It's done. Tomorrow I'm going to make a call to your mama. Most of my friends met boyfriends that they're so seriously moving in with or figuring out their lives with. and I don't even know what I'm going to wear tomorrow, let alone what I'm going to do with my life versus I tried telling you not to focus on the hard classes and to take the easy classes and meet the guys that hang around outside those buildings. The smart guys, they hang around all the dumb college buildings, all those majors that are the non- majors. I tried telling you, do not do computer engineering and scare the out of men. But you do not listen. You told me that if I didn't do a STEM degree, then you would not pay my tuition. You have to do the STEM degree in the still of the night secretly so nobody knows that you're actually using your brain. That is every woman knows that that is the procedure. So you're saying it's my fault? Yes. So what do I do? It's too late.
